author: Anirudha Ramesh
name: M4 Air Autoresearch Bandit — Mirrored Recurrence + SwiGLU
blurb: Distributed autoresearch with evolutionary bandit over 14 candidate architectures on M4 Air (16GB). 84 experiments overnight, 3.226 → 1.926 bpb. Best M4 Air score we're aware of. Key discoveries: warmdown schedule fix (-0.98 bpb), mirrored recurrence (4 unique blocks / 8 logical layers), SwiGLU, cross-pollination between candidates.
